svg.text: Coding_Pipeline.ipynb · single end-to-end pass over 5 pilot interviews · LLM-agnostic (call_llm swap point) · state in Python dicts, persisted to JSON
l3 in C9 · story in C10
C9 7–12 clusters · each L3 in exactly one · iq_ids ∈ db
C10 every cluster has non-empty story
C11 5 JSON files written to pipeline_output/
L1 (1,10) per Q&A · L2 (20,30) per interview
prompt schema → backward trace built in C9
Lineage chain · backward trace from cluster to source Q&A (assembled in C9, consumed by C10 Explainer)
